entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A rainfed crop grown in diverse environments and management in India, subject to production fluctuations.

entities.name: GENOTYPE BY ENVIRONMENT BY MANAGEMENT INTERACTIONS
entities.description: GxExM interactions that pose a serious challenge for production and crop improvement efforts.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country used as a case study for rainfed groundnut production.

entities.name: YIELD GAP ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to understand GxExM interactions and estimate potential yields and yield gaps.

entities.name: GEO-BIOPHYSICAL CHARACTERS
entities.description: Characteristics of the production region used to understand and deal with GxExM interactions.

entities.name: WEATHER AND SOIL DATA
entities.description: Environmental data collected to simulate groundnut production at the district scale.

entities.name: CROP PARAMETERS
entities.description: Specific parameters of the groundnut crop used for production simulation.

entities.name: MANAGEMENT INFORMATION DATA
entities.description: Data regarding agricultural management practices used for production simulation.

entities.name: POTENTIAL YIELDS
entities.description: The maximum possible yield of a crop under optimal conditions.

entities.name: YIELD GAPS
entities.description: The difference between potential yields and actual yields observed in production.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PRACTICES
entities.description: Recommended agricultural practices that can be used to bridge the production gap.

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT
entities.description: An environmental constraint that limited yield potential by an average of 40%.

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to resolve unexplained variation in agronomic model output.

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to group districts into homogeneous production units.

entities.name: HOMOGENEOUS PRODUCTION UNITS
entities.description: Region-specific units with well-defined production-limiting constraints used to design GxM products.

entities.name: PRODUCTION-LIMITING CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Specific factors that limit crop productivity within a given Homogeneous Production Unit.
